programmes.show_description: Joining Radio 5 Live.
Mark Stephen and Rachel Stewart with stories from the great outdoors.
The stories that matter across Scotland and the world.
Duncan Scott, Sue Perkins and Rob Wainwright chat to Amy Irons and Steven Mill as they kick-off the weekend with lots of laughs, great guests and timeless tunes.
The most petty and ill-informed football show on radio.
Full commentary of Ireland v Scotland on a huge day for Gregor Townsend's side, with the Six Nations Championship up for grabs.
Full commentary of Celtic v Motherwell, with updates from across the country.
Ian McCall and Ryan Stevenson debate the big talking points following Saturday's action as the fans join the debate.
Full commentary of Kilmarnock v Hearts live from Rugby Park (ko 20:00).
Roddy Hart with a mix of classic tracks and new discoveries.
Joining Radio 5 Live.
Martin Geissler and the team bring you thoughtful conversation and expert analysis covering the most interesting news stories in Scotland.
An act of worship with Church of Scotland minister Rev Gillean Maclean in Inverness.
Poet and musician John Hegley shares his Spiritual Life, marking the Dunblane tragedy 30 years on, Louis Theroux's Inside the Manosphere and political posturing at the Oscars.
News, discussion and interviews from politics and beyond.
Richard Gordon presents Sunday's Premiership action, with full commentary of St Mirren v Rangers (12:00 ko) followed by the Dundee derby live from Dens Park (14:00 ko).
Join Gary as he shares your special messages and dedications and plays your favourite Scottish Music requests.
Jamie MacDougall has a concert recording from the BBC Scottish Symphony Orchestra, and we remember composer Sir Peter Maxwell Davies, who passed away ten years ago this month.
Roddy Hart plays handpicked tracks from Scotland and beyond. Featuring Belfast-based alternative-folk singer-songwriter Dani Larkin.
Joining Radio 5 Live.
